name: code-graph-builder
description: Local-first interactive codebase analysis and graph visualization tool
author: Jagan Jijo <https://jagan-jijo.github.io/portfolio/>

scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.setup: python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:unix: python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements.txt && cd frontend && npm install
